title: Life science visualization
prompt: A layered 3D life science education video, abstract cells and systems, smooth transitions, clean labels and classroom-friendly visual clarity.
negative_prompt: messy labels, low clarity, excessive effects

title: Project roadmap visualization
prompt: A clean academic project roadmap, white background, structured nodes, restrained arrows, smooth camera transition and readable labels.
negative_prompt: cluttered layout, glowing poster style, unreadable text
